span.p: Show in Hot Zone with quick actions

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Eat, call consumeLeftover, update inventory/cache, analytics leftover_consumed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Freeze, call FreezerService.moveToFreezer, set is_frozen/frozenAt/freezerExpiry, analytics move_to_freezer
